tracks.rawText: 4:09Rising Highv5.5CoverHigh-energy Vedic metal track featuring aggressive male chanting vocals over a fusion of traditional Indian percussion and heavy thrash metal instrumentation, The arrangement is driven by rapid-fire double-kick drumming and distorted electric guitar riffs that mirror the rhythmic patterns of the Sanskrit verses, The vocal delivery is rhythmic and percussive, utilizing a deep, resonant baritone with a staccato cadence, The production is dense and powerful, with a prominent low-end and sharp, biting guitar tones, The tempo is fast, approximately 140 BPM, maintaining a relentless and intense energy throughout, Traditional elements like the dhol or mridangam are layered with the drum kit to create a unique folk-metal hybrid sound, The song structure is linear and repetitive, building intensity through vocal layering and increasing instrumental complexity1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Rising High

tracks.rawText: 3:42Rising Highv5.5CoverHigh-energy Vedic metal track featuring aggressive male chanting vocals over a fusion of traditional Indian percussion and heavy thrash metal instrumentation, The arrangement is driven by rapid-fire double-kick drumming and distorted electric guitar riffs that mirror the rhythmic patterns of the Sanskrit verses, The vocal delivery is rhythmic and percussive, utilizing a deep, resonant baritone with a staccato cadence, The production is dense and powerful, with a prominent low-end and sharp, biting guitar tones, The tempo is fast, approximately 140 BPM, maintaining a relentless and intense energy throughout, Traditional elements like the dhol or mridangam are layered with the drum kit to create a unique folk-metal hybrid sound, The song structure is linear and repetitive, building intensity through vocal layering and increasing instrumental complexityPublishRemix
tracks.title: Rising High

tracks.rawText: 2:38****v5.5The heaviest wounds are carved in silence, ""A scream they’ll never hear, ""When family turns to stone, the soul burns alone, ""Silent betrayal cuts the deepest, ""This is not just metal, it’s vengeance in soundPublishRemix

4:33skyfallv5.5CoverOrchestral rock anthem with cinematic production, Features a prominent grand piano playing a repetitive eighth-note ostinato in the mid-range, A baritone male vocal delivers a dramatic performance, transitioning from a breathy chest voice to a powerful, belted head voice in the chorus, The arrangement builds with a staccato string section and deep, resonant orchestral percussion including timpani and concert bass drum, Distorted electric guitars enter during the chorus with sustained power chords and a thick, saturated tone, A soaring legato string ensemble provides melodic counterpoint in the higher register, The track is in the key of D minor with a tempo of 76 BPM in 4/4 time, The production uses heavy hall reverb on the vocals and drums to create a vast spatial image1PublishRemix
tracks.title: skyfall
